column1: # NOTE: This is the original DESIGN-REFERENCE BOM (with rationale). For ordering/assembly use 06-bom-assembly.csv
column2: which is reconciled 1:1 with the schematic (71 parts incl. J_EXP spare-GPIO header) and is AUTHORITATIVE. This file may list reserved/optional parts (e.g. C_DP/C_DM) not present on the generated board.

column1: # ALL-SMD board EXCEPT the off-board connectors
column2: which are through-hole (keyed JST-XH 2.5mm for button/knob/LED; screw terminals for power/motor/encoder). All actives/passives are SMD = single SMT reflow; THT connectors via JLCPCB THT assembly or hand-soldered. See 02-schematic-blocks.md Block G.

column8: Exact XIAO ESP32-S3R8 silicon; use -1U for ext antenna
At module 3V3/GND pads; cures TX-burst brownout. SMD polymer - NOT a radial can; LCSC stock thin
GPIO0 strap - MUST stay small (never ~0.1uF); check stock
USB 2.0 receptacle (power+data); SMD with board-edge tabs
Optional D+/D- EMI caps - leave unpopulated
Fallback UART prog: 3V3/GND/EN/GPIO0/U0TXD(43)/U0RXD(44) - bare SMD pads, no part placed unless needed
Input fault/fire protection - slow-blow NANO2; 125V rating satisfies >=63V DC need
Clamp Q1 Vgs gate-to-source (AO3401A Vgs abs-max +/-12V)
24V transient clamp - clamps small/typical surges below buck 38V abs-max; at full rated surge VC 45.4V exceeds it (accepted residual risk behind fuse + FET impedance)
Input surge ride-through - SMD can only
Splits input ripple (BH=50V; CH was a typo)
VM bulk - 50V for 24V margin - SMD can only
LED low-side N-MOSFET (SMD - replaces your TH MOSFETs)
Drain clamp - DNP unless ringing seen
Encoder VCC/GND/A (3P half); gangs with J_SENSOR-B on the 5-pos SCREW5 land (no 5P 3.5mm block on LCSC); Z->GPIO14
Encoder B/Z (2P half); butts against J_SENSOR-A
Optional encoder A/B/Z pull-up stiffening to 3V3 - DNP (populate only for long/noisy cable)
Spare IO1/IO2/IO13/IO38-42 + 3V3/GND; DNP for bare pads
